ItacAcademyItem.Name: Curiosi (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: This academy is mentioned in Antonio Zanon, Della utilita` morale, economica, e politica delle accademie di agricoltura, arti, e commercio..., vol. VIII (1771)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
